description_long: This storage locker is a large, industrial-style unit with a robust rectangular body, featuring a combination of orange-brown metallic framing and dark gray paneling. The top surface is equipped with two circular hatches and a prominent cylindrical vent pipe running along one side, suggesting advanced ventilation or exhaust capabilities. The front section includes a smaller, attached compartment with multiple black pipes extending outward, likely for utility or access purposes. The sides are reinforced with metallic ribbing and additional vent structures, while the rear features a large, arched entryway and a thick, curved exhaust pipe. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for secure storage of equipment or hazardous materials. Its design is consistent with use in industrial or urban infrastructure settings, emphasizing durability, security, and ventilation.
description: A large, industrial storage locker with orange-brown metal framing, dark gray panels, and prominent ventilation pipes. Features include circular hatches, a side exhaust, and a reinforced, compartmentalized structure.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main rectangular body, two circular hatches on top, and a smaller compartment with multiple black pipes extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the attached compartment, the ribbed metallic structure, and the large curved exhaust pipe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the cylindrical vent pipe, multiple vertical vent structures, and the reinforced back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the arched entryway, the end of the cylindrical vent, and the smaller compartment with pipe extensions.
